nasb.text: Therefore they offer a sacrifice to their net And burn incense to their fishing net; Because through these things their catch is large, And their food is plentiful.

esv.text: Therefore he sacrifices to his net and makes offerings to his dragnet; for by them he lives in luxury, and his food is rich.

cnv.text: 向自己的網獻祭，對魚網燒香， 因他們藉此收穫豐富，飲食充裕。

ccb.text: 迦勒底人向渔网献祭， 向渔网烧香， 因为他们靠渔网而富裕， 食物充足。
